title: Open Canvas
tagline: Rough ideas welcome. We refine, build, and tell you what shipped.

timeline.title: A blank canvas
timeline.description: An immaculate, empty canvas — waiting for its first idea.

timeline.title: Canvas reset
timeline.description: The canvas was cleared back to a blank slate.

timeline.title: Pixel snake
timeline.description: A retro pixel snake slithered onto the canvas.

timeline.title: Dice roller
timeline.description: An interactive tabletop dice roller landed on the canvas — add up to 5 dice, watch them tumble with pip faces, and chase confetti-worthy max rolls and matching doubles.
timeline.request: I want to have a dice roll random number feature widget

prompts.refinedIdea: A retro pixel snake slithering across the canvas
prompts.shippedNote: We turned your snake idea into a floating 8-bit pixel snake with a little eye — classic arcade vibes.

prompts.idea: I want to have a dice roll random number feature widget
prompts.refinedIdea: An interactive tabletop dice roller: pick 1–5 dice, tap to send them tumbling, see classic pip faces plus a running total, with confetti for all-sixes max rolls and matching doubles.
prompts.shippedNote: We turned your dice idea into a real tabletop roller with tumbling pip dice, an adjustable number of dice, and a live total. Roll all sixes (or matching doubles) and confetti rains down — go tempt fate!
